stack_conflict.detail: Client briefing requests React 18+ / Tailwind CSS / shadcn/ui / Framer Motion. WFO global constraint mandates .NET 9 / Razor Pages / Bootstrap 5. React is FORBIDDEN under WFO rules unless @Architect approves.
resolution_options: A) @Architect approves React exception — WFO builds outside standard factory model (scope/price may differ)
B) Operator confirms WFO-native stack — .NET 9 / Razor Pages / Bootstrap 5 / AOS.js proceeds as planned
